Claude Code 技术干货

1. **Context Management is Paramount**: The most successful Claude Code users obsessively manage context through CLAUDE.md files, aggressive /clear usage, documentation systems (dev docs, living plans), and token-efficient tool design. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices (Anthropic), Ultimate\_AI\_Coding\_Guide, Getting\_Good\_Results, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use. **Sources**: 6\_months\_hardcore\_use, Ultimate\_AI\_Coding\_Guide, Getting\_Good\_Results, Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices. **Sources**: Getting\_Good\_Results, How\_Anthropic\_teams\_use, Ultimate\_AI\_Coding\_Guide, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, Getting\_Good\_Results, Ultimate\_AI\_Coding\_Guide, Building\_AI\_Factory. **Sources**: 6\_Weeks\_of\_Claude\_Code, what\_makes\_CC\_good, How\_I\_Use\_Every\_Feature. ❌ Don't: @-file docs (embeds entire file on every run) ✅ Do: "For complex usage or FooBarError, see path/to/docs.md" ❌ Don't: "Never use --foo-bar flag" (agent gets stuck) ✅ Do: "Never use --foo-bar; prefer --baz instead" ❌ Don't: Write comprehensive manual ✅ Do: Document what Claude gets wrong. **Sources**: if\_youre\_not\_using\_these, How\_I\_Use\_Every\_Feature, Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use, if\_youre\_not\_using\_these, Ultimate\_AI\_Coding\_Guide, Design\_Partner. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, How\_Anthropic\_teams\_use. **Sources**: 6\_months\_hardcore\_use, How\_I\_Use\_Every\_Feature, Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, Building\_AI\_Factory, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use, How\_I\_Use\_Every\_Feature. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use, if\_youre\_not\_using\_these. **Sources**: what\_makes\_CC\_good, Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, Ultimate\_AI\_Coding\_Guide, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, How\_Anthropic\_teams\_use, Poster\_Maker\_example. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, Building\_AI\_Factory, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use. **Sources**: Ultimate\_AI\_Coding\_Guide, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use, Getting\_Good\_Results. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, Building\_AI\_Factory. **Sources**: 6\_months\_hardcore\_use, Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices.

title: 💻 Claude Code: Practical Best Practices for Agentic Coding - Medium
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code: Practical Best Practices for Agentic Coding. With the release of **Claude Code**, Anthropic introduced a deliberately low-level, unopinionated command-line agent designed to integrate deeply into real developer workflows. This article distills the most valuable ideas from Anthropic’s official *Claude Code: Best Practices for Agentic Coding* and reframes them for **engineers, researchers, and advanced AI practitioners** who want to understand *why* these practices work — not just *how* to use them. > ***Claude Code works best when treated like a junior engineer with tools, memory, and iteration — not a magic code generator.***. Claude Code automatically pulls context from your environment. The Model Context Protocol (MCP) turns Claude into a **tool-orchestrating agent** rather than a single-model assistant. Claude Code is not just a coding assistant — it is an early glimpse of **AI-native software engineering**. Agent Teams in Claude Code. ## Agent Teams in Claude Code. ### I’ve been running Claude Code’s Agent Teams for real work.

title: 💻 [PDF] How Anthropic teams use Claude Code
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

They use Claude Code for automating routine data engineering tasks, troubleshooting complex infrastructure issues, and creating documented workflows for technical and non-technical team members to access and manipulate data independently. They use Claude Code for automating routine data engineering tasks, troubleshooting complex infrastructureissues,and creating documented workflows for technical and non-technical team members to access and manipulate data independently. As a non-technical team of one, they use Claude Code to automate repetitive marketing tasks and create agentic workflows that would traditionally require significant engineering resources. As a non-technical team of one, they use Claude Code to automate repetitive marketing tasks and create agentic workflows that would traditionally require significant engineering resources. 20 Claude Code for RL engineering Claude Code for RL engineering Development workflow impact Top tips from the RL Engineering team 20 Experimental approach enabled They now use a "try and rollback" methodology, frequently committing checkpoints so they can test Claude's autonomous implementation attempts and revert if needed, enabling more experimental.

title: 💻 Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide - SmartScope
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

#!/bin/bash# parallel_processing.sh # Implement parallel processing()  { local  file = " $1 "  local  output_dir = " $2 "  echo  "Processing: $file "    "Optimize this code for performance"   " $file "   " $output_dir/$( " $file ") "} # Execute in parallel export      "*.py"  |    4   {}  echo  "✅ Parallel processing completed". #!/bin/bash# robust_processing.sh set    # Stop on error # Log configuration LOG_FILE ="claude_batch.log" exec  1  (  " $LOG_FILE ") exec  2  (  " $LOG_FILE "  & 2) # Error handling function()  { local  line_number = " $1 "  echo  "❌ Error occurred at line: $line_number "  echo  "📝 Check log file: $LOG_FILE "  exit  1} trap  'handle_error $LINENO'  # Process execution()  { local  max_retries = 3  local  retry_count = 0  while  ;  do  if    "Process these files"   300     ;  then  echo  "✅ Processing completed successfully"  return  0  else  (())  echo  "⚠️ Attempt $retry_count failed, retrying..."   5  fi  done  echo  "❌ Processing failed after $max_retries  attempts"  return  1} # Main processing()  { echo  "🚀 Starting batch processing..."  # Pre-processing  if  ;  then  echo  "❌ Input file not found"  exit  1  fi  # Execute processing   # Post-processing  if  ;  then  echo  "✅ Batch processing completed successfully"  else  echo  "❌ Output file is empty or missing"  exit  1  fi}  " $@ ".

title: 💻 Claude Code: batch-operations | Skills Marketplace - LobeHub
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

The batch-operations skill automates and coordinates repetitive developer tasks by detecting and executing 3+ similar operations (file edits, searches, test runs, git commands). It announces: 'I'm using the batch-operations skill to process these efficiently.' Core features include parallel tool calls, chained Bash loops, a replace\_all edit mode, and delegation to a batch-editor subagent for safe multi-file refactors. Use it for renaming symbols across files, reading multiple configs, bulk annotations, or scripted batch runs. # Batch Operations Skill. ## When to Batch. Use batching for 3+ similar operations: file edits, searches, test runs, git operations. | batch-editor Agent | `Task(subagent_type=batch-editor, prompt="Rename userId to user_id")` |. `Task(subagent_type=batch-editor, prompt="Rename userId to user_id")`. `Task(subagent_type=batch-editor, prompt="Rename userId to user_id in src/models/*.py")`. `Read https://lobehub.com/skills/skill.md and follow the instructions to setup LobeHub Skills Marketplace then submit a review using: `npx -y @lobehub/market-cli skills comment htramsey-claude-config-batch-operations -c "<your review>" --rating 5 (or 1-4)`. `Curl https://lobehub.com/skills/htramsey-claude-config-batch-operations/skill.md, then follow the instructions to set up LobeHub Skills Marketplace and install the skill.

title: 💻 Claude Code: Batch processing - Claude API Docs
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Message Batches API. The Message Batches API is a powerful, cost-effective way to asynchronously process large volumes of Messages requests. ## How the Message Batches API works. When you send a request to the Message Batches API:. Any request that you can make to the Messages API can be included in a batch. ## How to use the Message Batches API. **Test your batch requests with the Messages API**. Validation of the `params` object for each message request is performed asynchronously, and validation errors are returned when processing of the entire batch has ended. echo "Batch $MESSAGE_BATCH_ID is still processing...". Once batch processing has ended, each Messages request in the batch has a result. `{"custom_id":"my-second-request","result":{"type":"succeeded","message":{"id":"msg_014VwiXbi91y3JMjcpyGBHX5","type":"message","role":"assistant","model":"claude-opus-4-6","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Hello again! {"custom_id":"my-first-request","result":{"type":"succeeded","message":{"id":"msg_01FqfsLoHwgeFbguDgpz48m7","type":"message","role":"assistant","model":"claude-opus-4-6","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Hello! curl --request POST https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages/batches/$MESSAGE_BATCH_ID/cancel \. The Message Batches API supports prompt caching, allowing you to potentially reduce costs and processing time for batch requests. ### Can I use the Message Batches API with other API features? ### Can I use prompt caching in the Message Batches API?
